	dec := codegen.NewDecoder(hdr)

	var hkey MethodKey
	copy(hkey[:], dec.Read(len(hkey)))

	sc := readTraceContext(dec)

	ctx := readContextMetadata(context.Background(), dec)
	return ctx, hkey, micros, sc
}
